title: Marisol rumbo a Río
writer: José María Palacio, Alfonso Paso, Arturo Rígel
actors: Marisol, Isabel Garcés, José Marco Davó
plot: Twin sisters Marisol and Mariluz live separately: Mariluz with their uncle in Rio de Janeiro; and Marisol with their mother in Madrid. Marisol's mother has desperately tried to get money to see Mariluz in Brasil, so she and Mariso...
